channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: The CFTC starts crack down on the growing insider problem in prediction markets
item.description: On Mar. 12, the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) issued a staff advisory telling exchanges to tighten surveillance on event contracts. Simultaneously, the regulator opened a 45-day rulemaki...
item.dc:creator: CryptoSlate

item.description: Lawrence Abrams reports: Canadian business process outsourcing giant Telus Digital has confirmed it suffered a security incident after threat actors claimed to have stolen nearly 1 petabyte of data fr...

item.title: Why Stryker's Outage Is a Disaster Recovery Wake-Up Call
item.description: The Iranian cyberattack on Stryker is the kind of stress test that business continuity and disaster recovery programs often do not plan for....

item.title: What Orgs Can Learn From Olympics, World Cup IR Plans
item.description: In this edition of "Reporters' Notebook," we discuss cyberattackers targeting the Milan-Cortina Winter Games, adding them to a long list of global sporting events in the crosshairs. Though the attack ...

item.title: Not Your Keys, Not Your Coins: What True Self-Custody Actually Requires

item.title: How to Scale Phishing Detection in Your SOC: 3 Steps for CISOs

item.title: China’s CERT warns OpenClaw can inflict nasty wounds

item.title: Bell Ambulance data breach impacted over 238,000 people
item.description: Pierluigi Paganini reports: Nearly 238,000 individuals are impacted by a February 2025 Bell Ambulance data breach. Bell Ambulance is a U.S.-based emergency medical services provider offering ambulance...

item.title: Lotte Card fined 9.6 billion won for leaking users’ social registration numbers
item.description: Korea JoongAng Daily reports: Lotte Card was fined 9.6 billion won ($6.5 million) by the Personal Information Protection Commission (PIPC) after 450,000 users’ social registration numbers were leaked....

item.title: Attackers Don't Just Send Phishing Emails. They Weaponize Your SOC's Workload
item.description: The most dangerous phishing campaigns aren’t just designed to fool employees. Many are designed to exhaust the analysts investigating them. When a phishing investigation takes 12 hours instead of five...

item.title: Apple Issues Security Updates for Older iOS Devices Targeted by Coruna WebKit Exploit
item.description: Apple on Wednesday backported fixes for a security flaw in iOS, iPadOS, and macOS Sonoma to older versions after it was found to be used as part of the Coruna exploit kit. The vulnerability, tracked a...
